hypothesis: Timestamp-safe exchange-reported bi-monthly short-interest publication changes could support a broad common-stock event table only if official historical publication dates, records, and conservative common-stock mapping are proven first.
candidate_product_pool: U.S. exchange-listed common stocks with official/reproducible historical exchange-reported short-interest records
Official dissemination/publication dates tied to each settlement cycle
Conservative common-stock symbol/security mapping with qfa/Alpaca daily bar coverage

selected_universe.reason: No free/public official source was proven to provide broad multi-year listed-common-stock short-interest records with reproducible publication/dissemination dates.

source_gate.why_performance_not_run: Required source/vintage/breadth gate failed. Per issue rule, no qfa/Alpaca daily bar evaluator or performance metrics were run.
source_gate.publication_date_assessment: Not proven. Nasdaq states release after 4:00 p.m. ET on dissemination date, but the current public schedule link redirected to Nasdaq Data Link/NSIR rather than a free historical table; NYSE sample files carried FTP modification dates not official dissemination vintages; FINRA API partitions are settlement dates only.

finra.blocking_note: Public standardized API sample showed OTC-only rows and no broad listed-exchange common-stock source; FINRA file page notes prior-to-June-2021 files exclude exchange-listed securities.

nasdaq.blocking_note: No free broad historical listed-security records or reproducible historical dissemination-date table were found.

nyse.catalog_claim: Semi-monthly file containing reported uncovered short positions of securities listed on NYSE, NYSE Arca and NYSE American; historical data Jan 1988-present.
nyse.blocking_note: Samples demonstrate schema/breadth potential but only two settlement dates were public samples, with FTP modification dates months after settlement and no multi-year official publication-vintage archive.

orthogonality.AR-140_FINRA_daily_short_volume: not_run_no_event_table; source differs conceptually but source gate failed

rationale: Nasdaq official broad historical files appear subscription/SFTP only and public by-issue data is rolling 12 months.
NYSE official historical listed short-interest file is an order/subscription product; public FTP samples cover only two 2026 settlement dates and do not prove publication vintages.
FINRA public API/file probe was OTC-oriented and did not establish listed common-stock breadth or dissemination dates.
Hard gate of >=150 liquid mapped common stocks with multi-year official publication observations was not met.
decision_summary.children: none; rejected source-gate scout should not spawn direct short-interest continuation children

warnings: Source reachability and NYSE sample breadth were not promoted to an alpha result.
No qfa/Alpaca bars were fetched; no performance, raw bars, weights, or equity curves exist.
A licensed Nasdaq/NYSE product with historical dissemination metadata could reopen the gate, but it was not available as a reproducible public artifact in this run.
